name: options-mode
description: Options mode: choice-prompt enforcement hooks for Claude Code and repo-local Codex sessions

interface.shortDescription: Enforce choice prompts when an agent needs user input.
interface.longDescription: Options Mode enforces choice-prompt mode in Claude Code via SessionStart rule injection, a `/options-mode on|off|status` slash command, and a deterministic Stop-hook tag protocol; repo-local Codex sessions get SessionStart context injection.
defaultPrompt: Use options mode for this task.
Ask me with structured choices whenever you need input.
